CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-23-2023 Set For Trial On Jun-24-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-07-2023 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT BDE ARCHITECTURE, INC.'S DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT

No appearance.

There being no appearance or objection, the court adopts its tentative ruling as follows:

BDE Architect, Inc.'s demurrer is overruled.

The demurrer presents the issue of whether negligent representation must be pled with specificity. Our supreme court finds that the California courts have never so decided, with limited exceptions not relevant here. (Small v. Fritz Companies, Inc. (2003) 30 Cal.4th 167, 184.) Given California's liberal pleading rules (CCP 452), the better view is that negligent representation need not be pled with specificity.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported. (302/RBU)
